feature_policy: fresh API reconstruction via copied hash-locked Stagev5/Stagev4 feature source; no historical feature or cache replay
model_policy: frozen Stagev5 AD/control anchor plus prespecified Stagev8.5 MMSE-informed ordinal severity heads

transport_contract.request_body: prepared from original json payload dictionaries

global_rerun_contract: force-clears generated Stagev8.5 outputs, performs fresh E/M/L API reconstruction, verifies the frozen anchor, trains the ordinal severity model, and renders the notebook
